igbo.arithmetic_strategy_challenge: Ihe Ịma Aka nke Atụmatụ Arithmetic
igbo.correct_the_exact_answer_and_estimate_: Ziri ezi. Azịza ziri ezi na atụmatụ ọnụọgụ dabara n'otu.
igbo.your_exact_answer_is_correct_revise_th: Azịza gị ziri ezi. Gbanwee atụmatụ ọnụọgụ ka ọ dị nso nke ga-abara uru maka nlele.
igbo.not_yet_compare_your_answer_with_your_: Ọ ka erubeghị. Tụnyere azịza gị na atụmatụ ọnụọgụ gị ma gbalịa otu atụmatụ.
igbo.that_is_not_the_key_error_read_the_wor: Nke ahụ abụghị isi njehie ya. Gụọ ọrụ ahụ otu place value n'otu.
igbo.correct_the_operation_and_context_answ: Ziri ezi. Operation na azịza dabere n'ọnọdụ, ha abụọ dabara na akụkọ ahụ.
igbo.reconsider_which_operation_represents_: Chegharịa maka operation nke na-egosi mmekọrịta dị n'akụkọ ahụ.
igbo.the_operation_fits_recheck_how_the_con: Operation ahụ dabara. Lelee ọzọ ka ọnọdụ ahụ si agbanwe nsonaazụ ọnụọgụ.
igbo.opening_a_missed_story_for_another_try: Na-emeghe akụkọ e mehiere maka ọgbọ ọzọ.
igbo.place_value_table_and_text_alternative: Tebụl place value na ihe nnọchi ederede
igbo.place_value_alignment_for: Nhazi dabere na place value maka
igbo.has_no_dots_because_one_factor_is_zero: enweghị ntụpọ ọ bụla n'ihi na otu factor bụ efu; product bụ efu.
igbo.one_factor_is_0_so_there_are_no_equal_: Otu factor bụ 0, ya mere enweghị otu hà nhata a ga-ese. Product: 0.
igbo.area_model_showing_partial_products_fo: Model area na-egosi partial products maka
igbo.complete_groups_of: otu zuru ezu, nke ọ bụla nwere
igbo.this_whole_number_workspace_keeps_the_: Ebe ọrụ whole number a na-eme ka ọnụọgụ nke abụọ ghara ịkarị nke mbụ. Mgbe ebumnuche mmụta bụ nsonaazụ na-adịghị mma, jiri integer number line.
igbo.read_strategy_aloud: Gụpụta atụmatụ ahụ n'olu dara ụda
igbo.reasonableness_check_use_friendly_oper: Nlele ezi uche: jiri ọnụọgụ ndị dị mfe ịgụta
igbo.estimation_is_a_safety_check_not_a_rep: Ịtụ anya bụ nlele nchekwa, ọ bụghị nnọchi maka echiche ziri ezi.
igbo.correct_your_exact_answer_and_estimate: Ziri ezi. Azịza gị ziri ezi na atụmatụ ọnụọgụ gị na-akwado ibe ha.
igbo.your_exact_answer_is_right_revise_the_: Azịza gị ziri ezi. Gbanwee atụmatụ ọnụọgụ ka ọ banye n'ókè ezi uche gburugburu
igbo.not_yet_recheck_each_place_and_compare: Ọ ka erubeghị. Lelee place value ọ bụla ọzọ ma tụnyere ya na atụmatụ ọnụọgụ gị.
igbo.diagnose_the_reasoning_not_the_learner: Chọpụta echiche ahụ, ọ bụghị onye na-amụ ihe. Njehie bụ ihe àmà maka model ga-aba uru n'ọzọ.
igbo.look_again_at_what_happened_to_each_pl: Leekwa ihe mere na place value ọ bụla ma ọ bụ partial product ọ bụla.
igbo.that_operation_does_not_represent_the_: Operation ahụ egosibeghị mmekọrịta ahụ. Jụọ onwe gị ma akụkọ ahụ ọ na-ejikọta, na-ekewa, na-emeghachi otu hà nhata, ka ọ na-achọ otu ole ga-abanye.
igbo.the_whole_number_answer_is_right_re_re: Azịza whole number ziri ezi. Gụghachi ihe akụkọ ahụ chọrọ ka i mee na ihe fọdụrụ.
igbo.the_operation_fits_recheck_the_calcula: Operation ahụ dabara. Lelee mgbakọ ahụ ọzọ ma kpebie ma ọnọdụ ahụ na-eji quotient, nke fọdụrụ, ka ọ bụ otu ọzọ agbakwunyere.
igbo.choose_the_operation_from_the_story_th: Họrọ operation site n'akụkọ ahụ, wee kọwaa nsonaazụ ya n'ọnọdụ.
igbo.choose_an_operation_for_this_story: Họrọ otu operation maka akụkọ a
igbo.operation_for_the_current_story: Operation maka akụkọ dị ugbu a
igbo.n_3_relationship_are_quantities_joined_s: 3. Mmekọrịta: a na-ejikọta ọnụọgụ ndị a, a na-ekewa ha, a na-emeghachi ha n'otu hà nhata, ka a na-ekewa ha dabere na nha?
igbo.n_5_context_check_decide_what_the_story_: 5. Nlele ọnọdụ: kpebie ihe ọ pụtara n'akụkọ ahụ mgbe ihe fọdụrụ.
igbo.models_the_story_and_the_answer_is: na-egosi akụkọ ahụ, azịza ya bụ
igbo.concrete_visual_symbolic: Nke a na-emetụ aka → Nke a na-ahụ anya → Nke akara
igbo.build_meaning_first_compare_strategies: Buru ụzọ wuo nghọta, tụnyere atụmatụ, ma jiri atụmatụ ọnụọgụ lelee nsonaazụ ọ bụla.
igbo.a_correct_answer_matters_but_a_model_e: Azịza ziri ezi dị mkpa, mana model, nkọwa, atụmatụ ọnụọgụ, na nlele site na inverse operation bụ ihe na-eme ka echiche dịgide.
